steps.title: Match the table
steps.content: The table with $y=-2$ for $x=-7$, $x=-4$, and $x=5$ is B.

steps.title: Why these x-values are chosen
steps.content: The tables use $x=-7$, $-4$, and $5$ because those are exactly the zeros of $f$. At each one, the product contains a zero factor, so $f(x)-2=-2$.
